codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract. The compare-coingecko summary test no longer carries an explicit 15000ms timeout override, and current-head route tests now directly prove live-expanded onchain catalog behavior via mocked provider discovery data for networks, dexes, and pools.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and current HEAD. The implementation is fully contained in commit 727cb6b, removes the final timeout masking in tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts, and adds explicit current-head proof coverage in tests/app.test.ts for live-expanded onchain catalog behavior, so scrutiny no longer depends on historical commit attribution. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
